free_text: NEUTRON SCATTERING STUDIES OF THE DOUBLY MAGIC CALCIUM
NUCLEI, CALCIUM-40 AND CALCIUM-48, IN THE LOW ENERGY
- ENERGY SPREAD OF INCIDENT ION IN SOURCE GAS
- ENERGY DIFFERENCE OF NEUTRONS SCATTERING AT 0 DEGREES
AND THOSE SCATTERING OFF EDGE OF SAMPLE
- ENERGY SPREAD FROM THE STRAGGLING OF THE INCIDENT ION
IN THE ENTRANCE FOIL OF THE GAS CELL
*** ENERGY RESOLUTION GIVEN FOR 48CA DATA AT 8 MEV IN
PUBLISHED REFERENCE IS 220 KEV AND DIFFERS FROM
VALUE OF 115 KEV GIVEN IN THESIS.
- NEUTRON ATTENUATION AND MULTIPLE SCATTERING IN
- FINITE EXTENT OF NEUTRON SOURCE, DETECTOR, AND SAMPLE
DATA TAKEN FROM TABLES IN THESIS.
SEE DATA SET 13507 FOR 48CA DATA AT 7.97 MEV.
